subcodes.first_line: O Manifestation of Guidance! When the Light of Truth shone forth at the pole of the universe, it raised its banner in the Orient of Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر هدایت نور حقیقت چون در قطب عالم بتافت در مشرق احدیت علم افراخت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @light and darkness, @spiritual transformation
